finding_results.notes: Recast June's pressure questions into a blunt, bodily, high-contraction register and Omar's into a more balanced, precise syntax. Removed the repeated period-stopped interrogative house cadence in both confrontation clusters while preserving the chapter's weakened-grievance outcome.
finding_results.summary: June and Omar now ask pressure questions with clearly different rhythms and sentence architecture, so the two exchanges no longer flatten into the same clipped house cadence.

summary: Revised chapter_13 for dialogue/idiolect/cadence by separating June's and Omar's question rhythms and removing the repeated period-stopped interrogative tic.
